<h1>Source code for booktx.config</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Project configuration and path resolution for legacy and profile layouts.</span>

<span class="sd">booktx now supports two project shapes.</span>

<span class="sd">Legacy single-layout projects::</span>

<span class="sd">    book/</span>
<span class="sd">      source/</span>
<span class="sd">      .booktx/</span>
<span class="sd">        config.toml</span>
<span class="sd">        manifest.json</span>
<span class="sd">        names.json</span>
<span class="sd">        chunks/</span>
<span class="sd">        context.json</span>
<span class="sd">        context.md</span>
<span class="sd">        identity.json</span>
<span class="sd">        translation-store.json</span>
<span class="sd">        translation-version-ledger.json</span>
<span class="sd">        tasks/</span>
<span class="sd">        ingest/</span>
<span class="sd">        translated/</span>
<span class="sd">        reports/</span>
<span class="sd">        output/</span>

<span class="sd">Profile-layout projects::</span>

<span class="sd">    book/</span>
<span class="sd">      source/</span>
<span class="sd">      .booktx/</span>
<span class="sd">        source-config.toml</span>
<span class="sd">        source-manifest.json</span>
<span class="sd">        names.json</span>
<span class="sd">        chapter-map.json</span>
<span class="sd">        chunks/</span>
<span class="sd">      translations/</span>
<span class="sd">        &lt;profile&gt;/</span>
<span class="sd">          config.toml</span>
<span class="sd">          identity.json</span>
<span class="sd">          context.json</span>
<span class="sd">          context.md</span>
<span class="sd">          translation-store.json</span>
<span class="sd">          translation-version-ledger.json</span>
<span class="sd">          tasks/</span>
<span class="sd">          ingest/</span>
<span class="sd">          translated/</span>
<span class="sd">          reports/</span>
<span class="sd">          output/</span>

<span class="sd">The shared ``.booktx/`` tree is source-derived state only. Mutable translation</span>
<span class="sd">state lives under the explicitly resolved profile.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># ruff: noqa: E501</span>

    <span class="k">with</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">open</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;rb&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">fh</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">data</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tomllib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">load</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fh</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">data</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_toml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> did not contain a TOML object&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">data</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_write_toml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">write_bytes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tomli_w</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_read_legacy_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProjectConfig</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProjectConfig</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_read_toml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_write_legacy_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProjectConfig</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">_write_toml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exclude_none</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_read_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_read_toml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_write_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">_write_toml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exclude_none</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">))</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_profile_config">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_profile_config">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile_not_found&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation profile not found: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_read_toml</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_profile_config">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.write_profile_config">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">_write_toml</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exclude_none</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_profile_root_marker">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_profile_root_marker">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_profile_root_marker</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProfileRootMarker</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">PROFILE_ROOT_MARKER_FILENAME</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile_root_marker_missing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;profile root marker is missing: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ProfileRootMarker</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_profile_root_marker&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;profile root marker is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_profile_root_marker">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.write_profile_root_marker">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_profile_root_marker</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ProfileRootMarker</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_project</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_source_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_root_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profiles&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;legacy_project_required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;project uses the legacy single-layout format; profile-root markers are only available for translation profiles&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_config</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">load_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">marker</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProfileRootMarker</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project_source_id_or_unavailable</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_root_marker_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Atomic write so an interrupted preparation command never leaves a</span>
    <span class="c1"># half-written marker behind; booktx AGENTS.md preparation relies on this.</span>
    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">marker</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">by_alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">marker</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="list_profiles">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.list_profiles">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">list_profiles</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_or_root</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">names</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">iterdir</span><span class="p">()):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;config.toml&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">names</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">names</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="detect_format">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.detect_format">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">detect_format</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">SUPPORTED_SOURCE_SUFFIXES</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;unsupported_format&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Unsupported source format &#39;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&lt;none&gt;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&#39;. booktx supports only .md and .epub.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">SUPPORTED_SOURCE_SUFFIXES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_profile_name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation profile name must not be empty&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_absolute</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;/&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_profile_name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid translation profile name: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">PROFILE_NAME_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_profile_name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile names may contain only letters, numbers, &#39;.&#39;, &#39;_&#39; and &#39;-&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="canonical_language_key">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.canonical_language_key">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a canonical language shard key such as ``de`` or ``de-DE``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">raw</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;/&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">raw</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">raw</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;..&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">raw</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">startswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.json&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">LANGUAGE_KEY_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid_language_key&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid language key: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">canonical_parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">part</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:]:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">2</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isalpha</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">canonical_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">4</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">isalpha</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">canonical_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">canonical_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">canonical_parts</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="termbase_language_keys">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.termbase_language_keys">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">termbase_language_keys</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve the base-plus-locale language-key sequence for termbase reads.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">language</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">base</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">base</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;termbase_language_required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;--language is required when no profile target language is available&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">base</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">locale_raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">base</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">locale_raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">locale_raw</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">locale</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">locale_raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">locale</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">base</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">locale</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="global_termbase_dir">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.global_termbase_dir">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">global_termbase_dir</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Directory containing user-global translation termbase shards.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">override</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">os</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">environ</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;BOOKTX_TERMBASE_DIR&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">override</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">override</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">home</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.config&quot;</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;booktx&quot;</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-termbase&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="global_termbase_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.global_termbase_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">global_termbase_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to one user-global translation termbase shard.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">global_termbase_dir</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.json&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="project_termbase_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.project_termbase_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">project_termbase_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to one project/series termbase shard.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;termbase&quot;</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.json&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="profile_termbase_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.profile_termbase_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">profile_termbase_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to one profile-local termbase override shard.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profile termbase access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;termbase-overrides&quot;</span>
        <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.json&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="profile_termbase_snapshot_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.profile_termbase_snapshot_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">profile_termbase_snapshot_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Path to one frozen termbase snapshot shard for profile-root isolation.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profile termbase snapshot access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">key</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_language_key</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">language_key</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;termbase-snapshot&quot;</span>
        <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.json&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="n">SNAPSHOT_ID_RE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">re</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">compile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;^[0-9a-f]{1,128}$&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_snapshot_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">snapshot_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Validate a judge-sources snapshot generation digest before it enters a path.</span>

<span class="sd">    Snapshot ids are lowercase hexadecimal digests (any length up to 128 hex</span>
<span class="sd">    chars) so they are always path-safe and deterministic. They must never</span>
<span class="sd">    contain ``..``, separators, or upper-case characters.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">snapshot_id</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">SNAPSHOT_ID_RE</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fullmatch</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">snapshot_id</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;invalid_snapshot_id&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;snapshot id must be a lowercase hexadecimal digest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">snapshot_id</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_is_legacy_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_is_profile_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_base_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProjectConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">booktx_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_source_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">names_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;names.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunks_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chunks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_map_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chapter-map.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">identity_json_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">store_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ledger_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translated_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">tasks_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ingest_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">reports_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">effective</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">layout_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;profiles&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_with_profile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">effective</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProjectConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">booktx_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">names_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">names_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunks_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_map_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_map_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_context_json_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_context_md_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">identity_json_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_identity_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">store_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_store_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">ledger_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_ledger_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">translated_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_translated_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">tasks_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_tasks_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">ingest_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_ingest_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">reports_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_reports_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">output_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_profile_output_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">effective</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">layout_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;profiles&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="project_storage_root">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.project_storage_root">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">project_storage_root</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the root used for persisted profile-local path strings.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profiles&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="stored_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.stored_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Persist a path relative to the resolved profile when available.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project_storage_root</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">as_posix</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_stored_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.resolve_stored_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stored_rel_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve a persisted path against legacy root-relative or profile-relative roots.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">rel_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stored_rel_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">rel_path</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">legacy_candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">legacy_candidate</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project_storage_root</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">rel_path</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_profile_name">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.resolve_profile_name">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">explicit_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">operation</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;command&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">explicit_profile</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;profile_not_found&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;project does not use translation profiles; remove --profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">explicit_profile</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="n">profiles</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">list_profiles</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">explicit_profile</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">explicit_profile</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">explicit_profile</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">profiles</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;profile_not_found&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation profile not found: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">explicit_profile</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">explicit_profile</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">require_profile</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">profiles</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">available</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profiles</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; Available profiles: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">available</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">available</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;profile_required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;translation profile required; pass --profile PROFILE.&quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">suffix</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;no_profiles&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;no translation profile exists; run &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;`booktx profile create PROJECT_DIR PROFILE --target LANG`&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">_</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">operation</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_source_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_source_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_source_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">r</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_profile_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_base_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_read_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_legacy_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;not_a_project&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is not a booktx project: missing </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> or </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_profile_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_profile_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">require_profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">require_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">r</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_profile_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">base</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_base_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_read_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)))</span>
        <span class="n">selected_profile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">require_profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">require_profile</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">selected_profile</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">base</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_with_profile</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">selected_profile</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">load_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">selected_profile</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_is_legacy_layout</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_read_legacy_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">source_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">r</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">booktx_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_legacy_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">names_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;names.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunks_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chunks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_map_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chapter-map.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_json_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_md_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.md&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">identity_json_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;identity.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">store_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-store.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">ledger_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-version-ledger.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
