            <span class="n">translated_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translated&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">tasks_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;tasks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">ingest_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;ingest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">reports_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;reports&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">output_dir</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">r</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;output&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">layout_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;not_a_project&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is not a booktx project: missing </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_legacy_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> or </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="init_source_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.init_source_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">init_source_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_dir</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;not_a_directory&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> exists and is not a directory.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">root</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">root</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_booktx_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chunks&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">translations_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translations_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">booktx_dir</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chunks_dir</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">translations_root</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">rel_source_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">fmt</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_file</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">src</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expanduser</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_not_found&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source file not found: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">fmt</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">detect_format</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">dest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">dest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">resolve</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">dest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">write_bytes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_bytes</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="n">rel_source_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">src</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span>

    <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rel_source_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">fmt</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">_write_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;names.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">DEFAULT_NAMES_JSON</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_source_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_default_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">_default&quot;</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_default_output_filename</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">source_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;book&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">stem</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_name</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stem</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;book&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.epub&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.md&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_output_filename</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.epub&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.md&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">expected_fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">expected_fragment</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;output_target_mismatch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;output filename </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> does not match target language </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">; &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;expected a filename like </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">_default_output_filename</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_materialize_source_analysis_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Copy current canonical source analysis into a newly created profile.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">canonical_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_analysis_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">canonical_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>

    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">utc_timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.source_analysis</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">build_snapshot</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">read_canonical_report</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">render_report_markdown</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">read_canonical_report</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">report</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">profile_project</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">snapshot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">report</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">generated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">utc_timestamp</span><span class="p">(),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile_source_analysis_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_project</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">by_alias</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile_source_analysis_markdown_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_project</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">render_report_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">report</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="create_profile">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.create_profile">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">create_profile</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;pass-through&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;selection&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">validate_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_project</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_source_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;legacy_project_required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;project uses the legacy single-layout format; run `booktx profile migrate-current` first&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">existing_dir</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">existing_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">iterdir</span><span class="p">()):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile_already_exists&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation profile already exists: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">existing_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_config_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile_already_exists&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation profile already exists: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">final_output_filename</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">output_filename</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">_default_output_filename</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">target_language</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">_validate_output_filename</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">final_output_filename</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_cfg</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">identity_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProfileIdentityConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">actor</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;user:unknown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">harness</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;booktx&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">model</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;human&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProfileConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">final_output_filename</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_root</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">profile_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">profile_root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_tasks_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_ingest_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_translated_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_reports_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">_profile_output_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">mkdir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">exist_ok</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_profile_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_identity</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_with_profile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">TranslationIdentity</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">actor</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">harness</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">model</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identity_cfg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_profile_root_marker</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cfg</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">_materialize_source_analysis_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_profile_project</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="init_project">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.init_project">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">init_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">profile_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">project</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">init_source_project</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">create_profile</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_name</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">_default_profile_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_manifest">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.write_manifest">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Manifest</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_model_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">write_json_model_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">manifest_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_manifest">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_manifest">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Manifest</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">primary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">manifest_path</span>
    <span class="n">legacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_legacy_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_source_manifest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">primary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">primary</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profiles&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">legacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">legacy</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">source_manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_manifest</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">primary</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">Manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_names">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.write_names">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">names</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">NamesFile</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.io_utils</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span>

    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">names_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">names</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_names">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_names">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">NamesFile</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">names_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NamesFile</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">NamesFile</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">names_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">Exception</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: BLE001</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;bad_names_json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;names.json is invalid: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">exc</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="protected_terms_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.protected_terms_sha256">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">protected_terms_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;protected_terms&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">)},</span>
        <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">sort_keys</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">separators</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;,&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;:&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="project_source_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.project_source_sha256">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">project_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">:</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sha256_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="project_source_id">

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">project_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="project_source_id_or_unavailable">

            <span class="k">raise</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;unavailable&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="current_source_sha256">

<div class="viewcode-block" id="extracted_source_sha256">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.extracted_source_sha256">[docs]</a>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sha256</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">thing</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;profiles&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;profile_required&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">thing</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> requires a translation profile; pass --profile PROFILE.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="translation_store_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.translation_store_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">translation_store_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">store_path</span>
    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation store access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-store.json&quot;</span></div>

    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation version access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation-version-ledger.json&quot;</span></div>

    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation source index access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source-index.json&quot;</span></div>

    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation target index access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;target-index.json&quot;</span></div>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source-target-index.json&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="source_analysis_path">

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">source_analysis_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source-analysis.json&quot;</span></div>

<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Project-root generated source-analysis Markdown view path.</span>

<span class="sd">    report; never authoritative.</span>

<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Project-root durable source-analysis review/provenance sidecar.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source-analysis-decisions.json&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="profile_source_analysis_path">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.profile_source_analysis_path">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">profile_source_analysis_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Profile-local generated source-analysis snapshot JSON path.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/source-analysis.json``. The snapshot</span>
<span class="sd">    embeds the same report payload and ``analysis_sha256`` as the canonical</span>
<span class="sd">    project-root report inside a profile-scoped envelope. Rebuildable.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source analysis snapshot access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source-analysis.json&quot;</span></div>

<span class="sd">    profile snapshot&#39;s embedded report; never authoritative.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_require_profile_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source analysis snapshot markdown access&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source-analysis.md&quot;</span></div>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_translation_store">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.load_translation_store">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_translation_store</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translation_store_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">raw</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">raw</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">legacy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationStore</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.progress</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">load_source_records</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.translation_store</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">legacy_store_to_v2</span>

    <span class="n">source_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">load_source_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">legacy_store_to_v2</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">legacy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="load_translation_version_ledger">

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">JUDGE_SOURCES_DIRNAME</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_persist_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">layout_version</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">legacy_cfg</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ProjectConfig</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="nb">format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">_write_legacy_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">legacy_cfg</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_write_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="find_source_file">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.config.find_source_file">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">persist_discovery</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve the project source file.</span>

<span class="sd">    By default this **persists** a newly discovered source file/format back into</span>
<span class="sd">    the source config (a write side effect). Pass ``persist_discovery=False``</span>
<span class="sd">    for read-only lookups such as status overviews and hashing, so a getter no</span>
<span class="sd">    longer mutates project state.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">configured</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">configured</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_dir</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="n">configured</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span>

    <span class="n">candidates</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">path</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">iterdir</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">is_file</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">SUPPORTED_SOURCE_SUFFIXES</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;no_source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;No source document found in </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">. Drop a .md or .epub file into source/.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">_err</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;ambiguous_source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Found multiple source documents in </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_dir</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">names</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">. Keep exactly one.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chosen</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">chosen_format</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">detect_format</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chosen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">persist_discovery</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">chosen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">chosen_format</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chosen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chosen_format</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_file</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chosen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chosen_format</span>
        <span class="n">_persist_source_config</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chosen</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chosen</span></div>



<span class="c1"># Legacy single-layout -&gt; profile migration lives in its own module to</span>
<span class="c1"># quarantine the compatibility surface. Re-exported here for import</span>
<span class="c1"># compatibility (``from booktx.config import migrate_current_project``).</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.profile_migration</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># noqa: E402,F401</span>
    <span class="n">MigrationMove</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">ProfileMigrationPlan</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">build_profile_migration_plan</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">migrate_current_project</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
